user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a paginated list of asset categories with their code, maintain-asset-id flag and approximate life, so that I can review all defined categories at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset Categories screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns AssetCategoryID, Asset category, Code, Maintain asset id(s) and Approximate life of asset (month(s)) with pagination controls

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new asset category, so that I can track a new type of company asset
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset Categories screen; When I click Add new asset category and provide the category details; Then the new asset category is saved and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search asset categories, so that I can quickly find a specific category among many
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset Categories screen; When I enter search criteria and click Search; Then only matching asset categories are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset my search filters, so that I can return to the full list of asset categories
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied a search on the Asset Categories screen; When I click Reset; Then the filters are cleared and the full list is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing asset category, so that I can correct its code, life expectancy or maintain-id setting
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset Categories screen; When I click Edit on a category and change its details; Then the updated values are saved and reflected in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to navigate through pages and refresh the list, so that I can browse and see the latest asset categories
acceptance_criteria: Given the Asset Categories list spans multiple pages; When I use the Next/pagination controls or Refresh; Then the corresponding page of categories is loaded with current data
